children.label: B
children.text: the health and welfare of the people of the United States;

children.label: C
children.text: the economic interests of the livestock and related industries of the United States;

children.label: D
children.text: the environment of the United States; and

children.label: E
children.text: interstate commerce and foreign commerce of the United States in animals and other articles;
animal diseases and pests are primarily transmitted by animals and articles regulated under this chapter;
the health of animals is affected by the methods by which animals and articles are transported in interstate commerce and foreign commerce;
the Secretary must continue to conduct research on animal diseases and pests that constitute a threat to the livestock of the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: all animals and articles regulated under this chapter are in or affect interstate commerce or foreign commerce; and

children.label: i
children.text: to prevent and eliminate burdens on interstate commerce and foreign commerce;

children.label: ii
children.text: to regulate effectively interstate commerce and foreign commerce; and

children.label: iii
children.text: to protect the agriculture, environment, economy, and health and welfare of the people of the United States.
